name: contextshrink
description: Compress local repositories into token-budgeted XML context for Codex.

interface.longDescription: ContextShrink runs a local Rust CLI that parses repositories with tree-sitter, strips implementation bodies when useful, applies a token budget, and emits XML context for Codex.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $contextshrink to compress this repo into XML context before answering.
